cover_illustration.alt: Two kids at a glowing computer screen surrounded by code and cipher symbols

illustration.alt: An old locker with a strange symbol carved into it

illustration.alt: Zara showing a mysterious note to her friend Marcus in the hallway

illustration.alt: An alphabet wheel cipher decoder being used at a table

illustration.alt: Two kids triumphantly holding a decoded message that says THREE STEPS
illustration.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='300' height='200' fill='#E3F2FD'/><rect x='0' y='165' width='300' height='35' fill='#90CAF9'/><circle cx='100' cy='130' r='30' fill='#FFCC80'/><rect x='73' y='155' width='54' height='40' rx='6' fill='#EF5350'/><rect x='60' y='162' width='20' height='8' rx='4' fill='#FFCC80'/><rect x='118' y='160' width='22' height='8' rx='4' fill='#FFCC80'/><circle cx='200' cy='132' r='28' fill='#FFCC80'/><rect x='175' y='155' width='50' height='40' rx='6' fill='#42A5F5'/><rect x='162' y='162' width='18' height='8' rx='4' fill='#FFCC80'/><rect x='218' y='160' width='20' height='8' rx='4' fill='#FFCC80'/><rect x='105' y='80' width='90' height='52' rx='5' fill='#FFFDE7' stroke='#FFA000' stroke-width='2'/><text x='120' y='103' font-size='10' fill='#E65100' font-family='monospace' font-weight='bold'>THREE</text><text x='120' y='120' font-size='10' fill='#E65100' font-family='monospace' font-weight='bold'>STEPS</text><path d='M100,120 L105,100' stroke='#FFCC80' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M200,120 L195,100' stroke='#FFCC80' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

cipher.definition: A secret way of writing using a code

decrypt.definition: To convert a coded message into normal language

algorithm.definition: A set of rules for solving a problem step by step
